commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e1a55b369f5932eecc34e81bdde7c45009daba3d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shell-completion status mapping as a core doctor health check, dry-run repair effects, a guard that keeps real repair on the positional doctor path, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +143. Total +242 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature-style doctor observability PR. Source inspection shows the new structured lint mapping path, but no real shell-profile CLI run was provided for the changed behavior.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer decision on whether the new shell-completion warning should affect default `doctor --lint` exits.

target.title: Doctor: structure shell completion repair
target.body:
## Summary

This is the intentionally small doctor observability example.

- keeps the public doctor/plugin SDK contracts unchanged
- keeps real shell-completion repair on the existing `doctorShellCompletion()` path
- adds a core health check for shell completion so lint can report slow dynamic completion and missing completion caches
- adds dry-run effects for the two cheap, honest shell-completion repair previews
- keeps shell completion out of the broad structured repair pass so `doctor --fix` still uses the legacy positional contribution

The shape is meant to be the repeatable pattern for low-risk doctor work: expose structured findings first, add effects only where cheap, and do not rewrite legacy repair behavior.

Diff shape after rebuilding on current `main`:

- 5 files changed
- 249 insertions, 7 deletions
- rule work: 90 inserted lines across `doctor-completion.ts` and `doctor-core-checks.ts`
- broad-pass guard: 16 insertions, 7 deletions
- tests: 143 insertions

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-completion.ts src/commands/doctor-completion.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor-completion.ts src/commands/doctor-completion.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-completion.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 5 files, 44 tests
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `bash /mnt/c/src/claws-hapi/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
